name: Azrael
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Azrael is a quiet axis — Threshold veils; in Scorpio; with XIII Death.
flowText: Azrael is a quiet axis — Threshold veils; in Scorpio; with XIII Death.

related.name: Obsidian
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ♏ Scorpio
related.teaser: Scorpio is the underworld’s gate — serpent of shadow, phoenix flame, keeper of mysteries.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: XIII. Death
related.teaser: Death is not an end but a passage — dissolution of form into the dark womb of renewal.
